mechanics.excerpt: COMBAT may esolve the combat using the standard MW3 personal -combat rules: Determine the range between the units by multiplying the BattleTech hex range by 30 determine the range meters; cross off non character trooper): Each character present will be hit only once; if there are fewer points of damage remaining tnan characters_ determine which characters get hit randomly: If there are more points of damage remaining than characters each character iS hit once and the excess damage wasted.
